claims.explanation: Focused auth, session, context, and bootstrap tests pass on the canonical reconciled baseline.
claims.title: Sign-in, session, and filing-unit bootstrap

claims.explanation: Client sequencing and edge-function tests cover signed upload, extraction leases/dedupe/retries, and scoring CAS protection.
claims.next_action: Exercise a real storage and document fixture.
claims.title: Upload, extraction, and scoring pipeline

claims.explanation: Backend assembly and adapter tests pass, but the strict reality check still reports the package route as mock-backed.
claims.next_action: Wire and re-run the protected UI flow against real package data.
claims.title: Tax package product path

claims.explanation: The Q&A edge-function tests pass, but askTaxahead has zero application call sites.
claims.next_action: Wire the chat UI to the grounded Q&A wrapper.
claims.title: Grounded Q&A application wiring

claims.explanation: The reconciled build, public browser routes, sign-in, and magic-link onboarding contract pass the focused wiring suite; protected routes still need credentialed smoke.
claims.next_action: Run the protected route journey with a real account fixture.
claims.title: Lovable route and onboarding wiring

claims.explanation: Direct loads of analytics, members, support, AI, platform, and roles settle back at /admin instead of preserving the requested child route.
claims.next_action: Preserve child-route state on direct loads and refresh each admin section.
claims.title: Admin child routes survive direct refresh

claims.explanation: Browser console reports repeated data-tsd-source server/client hydration mismatches.
claims.next_action: Align source markers between SSR and client render, then replay the browser console check.
claims.title: SSR and client hydration console cleanliness

claims.explanation: ESLint reports 1,872 problems and Vitest could not start because the environment denied Vite temp-file creation.
claims.next_action: Repair lint debt and run the full harness with writable temporary storage.
claims.title: UI lint and test harness

claims.explanation: The reconciled baseline reports typed contract errors across demo session usage, edge-function options, and route search parameters.
claims.next_action: Repair typed contracts and rerun the checker.
claims.title: TypeScript verification

claims.explanation: OAuth and sync handlers are locally tested, but no production adapter is registered and providers remain not ready.
claims.next_action: Implement and register the first real provider adapter.
claims.title: Production connector adapters

claims.explanation: Provider credentials, live fixtures, deployed functions, and external smoke setup are absent; mocks do not prove live behavior.
claims.next_action: Configure provider apps and fixtures, deploy functions, then replay connect/sync/disconnect cleanup.
claims.title: Live provider lifecycle proof

claims.explanation: Reality-check setup lacks the required service keys and real document fixture.
claims.next_action: Provide the external setup and replay the full sign-in-to-package journey.
claims.title: Credentialed core live smoke

projects.goal: Ship the evidence-backed TaxAhead critical path from the reconciled Lovable frontend through real filing output.
projects.name: TaxAhead

claims.explanation: Historical live smoke cannot be replayed without browser, app server, dependencies, and fixtures.
claims.title: Core PMS workflow and live DOM proof

claims.explanation: The full historical suite is non-green and the initial run lacked a complete reproducible environment; sync and registration claims remain unverified.
claims.next_action: Resolve Prisma generation/database setup and rerun focused sync tests.
claims.title: PMS sync and extension registration

claims.explanation: No configured database URL or accessible dev database was available; Prisma generation and RLS probes did not complete.
claims.next_action: Provide the configured database and rerun migrations, drift, and RLS probes.
claims.title: Schema, data integrity, and RLS

claims.explanation: The extension harness requires Playwright, extension-capable Chrome, a running app, auth token, and database.
claims.next_action: Run the harness with all required inputs.
claims.title: Browser and extension proof

claims.explanation: Retained evidence records a non-green suite with 6 failures, 1,052 passes, and 11 skips; claims of fully verified/live/ready are unsupported.
claims.next_action: Rerun claim-specific live gates before any readiness statement.
claims.title: Historical readiness statements

projects.goal: Reverify PMS operations and data integrity in the background without taking human focus from TaxAhead.
projects.name: PadSplit Cockpit

state.focus_reason: Keep TaxAhead on the critical path
state.pivot_trigger: dependency failure or blocked external dead-end
